title: Anger Management Mod
description: Are you tired of accidentally hitting or attacking your friendly Villagers, Piglins, zombified Piglins, or Iron golems? Look no further than the 'Anger Management Mod'!
body: This mod adds a layer of protection to these passive mobs, preventing players from accidentally harming them. Say goodbye to the guilt of accidentally attacking your favorite villagers, or angering a pack of Zombified Piglins! With the Anger Management Mod, you can play Minecraft in a more peaceful and friendly way. So put down your fists, and embrace a kinder, gentler Minecraft experience!
